zh.Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可
zh.Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭斯林史爾法爾吉可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock於1262年6月2日出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可時，他的父親Herbert Maxwell 3rd Lord of Caerlaverock22歲，母親Mrs Hebert Maxwell21歲。他於1280年之前與Helen Pollock de Pencaitland結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1307年6月1日在蘇格蘭度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可享年44歲。

zh-hans.Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland: 苏格兰度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可
zh-hans.Falkirk, Stirlingshire, Scotland: 苏格兰斯林史爾法爾吉可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock于1262年6月2日出生在苏格兰度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可时，他的父亲Herbert Maxwell 3rd Lord of Caerlaverock22岁，母亲Mrs Hebert Maxwell21岁。他于1280年之前与Helen Pollock de Pencaitland结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1307年6月1日在苏格兰度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Kelso, near Melrose in Roxburghshire, the name of a salmon pool on the Tweed near Kelso Bridge. The placename is first recorded in 1144 in the form Mackeswell ‘Mack's spring or stream’ (Old English well(a)).
Irish: adopted for Ó Meisceall, see Miskell . This surname is common in Ulster.
Jewish: arbitrary adoption of the Scottish name, or Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Miskell
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Meisceall ‘descendant of Meiscill’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. Sometimes Anglicized as Maxwell .

nameMeanings.name: Sixth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician: variant of   Sisto  .

variants.name: Sixtos
meanings: Hispanic (Mexico): altered (plural) form of Galician Sixto , or perhaps derived from the personal name Sixto (see Sixt ). Compare Sistos .

variants.name: Sisto
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Elvira, Rocco, Vito, Angelo, Armando, Arturo, Aurelio, Carmino, Mario, Nicola, Nunzio, Salvatore.  Spanish Juan, Jesus, Javier, Manuel, Miguel, Pedro, Salvador.
Italian (mainly southern): from the personal name Sisto, a variant of Sesto . The name was popularized through the cults of various Christian popes, saints, and martyrs, named Sixtus in Latin.
Galician: habitational name from any of various places in Galicia (Spain) named Sisto.

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English laford, louerd, lord ‘lord, master’ (Old English hlāford), perhaps given to a someone who played the part of the lord or master of ceremonies in festival games.
Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as a translation of the main element of Gaelic Ó Tighearnaigh (see Tierney ) and Mac Thighearnáin (see McKiernan ).
Americanized form of French Laure, a variant of the personal name Laur 3.

variants.name: Tierney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, John Patrick, Brigid, Clodagh, Kieran, Michael Sean, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened form of O'Tierney, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tíghearnaigh ‘descendant of Tighearnach’, a byname meaning ‘lord, master’. The Gaelic name is sometimes ‘translated’ as English Lord . Compare Tiernan .

variants.name: Lords
meanings: English: variant of Lord , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Eustace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old French form of the Late Greek names Eustakhios and Eustathios. These were evidently of separate origin, the former derived from eu ‘well, good’ + stakhys ‘grapes’, the latter from eu + stēnai ‘to stand’. However, the tradition is very confused. The name was introduced in this form to Britain by the Normans, among whom it was popular as a result of the fame of St Eustace , a Norman nobleman who was said to have been converted to Christianity by the vision of a crucifix between the antlers of the stag he was hunting.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock was born on 2 June 1262, in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, Herbert Maxwell 3rd Lord of Caerlaverock, was 22 and his mother, Mrs Hebert Maxwell, was 21. He married Helen Pollock de Pencaitland before 1280. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 1 June 1307, in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock est né le 2 juin 1262, à Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Herbert Maxwell 3rd Lord of Caerlaverock, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mrs Hebert Maxwell, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Helen Pollock de Pencaitland avant 1280. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 1 juin 1307, à Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock am 2. Juni 1262 in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Herbert Maxwell 3rd Lord of Caerlaverock 22 und seine Mutter Mrs Hebert Maxwell 21. Er hat vor 1280 Helen Pollock de Pencaitland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Juni 1307 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock è nato il il 2 giugno 1262 nel Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Herbert Maxwell 3rd Lord of Caerlaverock, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Hebert Maxwell, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Helen Pollock de Pencaitland prima del 1280. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 1 giugno 1307, nel Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavockが1262年6月2日にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアケエルラバーオックで生まれた時，父Herbert Maxwell 3rd Lord of Caerlaverockは22歳，母Mrs Hebert Maxwellは21歳であった。1280年以前にHelen Pollock de Pencaitlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1307年6月1日にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアケエルラバーオックで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock(이)가 1262년 6월 2일 스컷랜드 드프리실르 카이를레이베록에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Herbert Maxwell 3rd Lord of Caerlaverock(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Hebert Maxwell(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1280년 이전 Helen Pollock de Pencaitland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1307년 6월 1일 스컷랜드 드프리실르 카이를레이베록에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.2 June 1262–1 June 1307: 2 de junho de 1262–1 de junho de 1307
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock nasceu em 2 de junho de 1262, em Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Herbert Maxwell 3rd Lord of Caerlaverock, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Hebert Maxwell, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Helen Pollock de Pencaitland antes 1280. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de junho de 1307, em Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock родился 2 июня 1262 г. в местности каирлавирокк, думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Herbert Maxwell 3rd Lord of Caerlaverock было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Hebert Maxwell, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Helen Pollock de Pencaitland перед 1280 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 1 июня 1307 г. в местности каирлавирокк, думфриессхир, Шотландия в возрасте 44 лет.

es.2 June 1262–1 June 1307: 2 de junio de 1262–1 de junio de 1307
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Eustace de Maxwell Sixth Lord Caerlavock nació el 2 de junio de 1262, en Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Herbert Maxwell 3rd Lord of Caerlaverock, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Mrs Hebert Maxwell, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Helen Pollock de Pencaitland antes de 1280. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 1 de junio de 1307, en Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, a la edad de 44 años.
